description: Express route with command injection: one without auth check, one with auth check. Taint flows in both cases since auth does not sanitize the input.

expected.notes: req.query.branch flows into child_process.exec in unauthed /deploy route
req.query.branch flows into child_process.exec in authed /deploy-safe route; auth check does not sanitize
No auth check before child_process.exec in /deploy handler
child_process.exec called without input validation guard
